title: GLM 5.2 Model Migration
summary: Migrate all OpenCode agent model configurations from GLM 5.1/4.7 to GLM 5.2. Two-layer architecture: primary agents inherit global default (overridable per-session), subagents pinned with explicit GLM 5.2 model (cost isolation from expensive orchestrators). Updates opencode.jsonc global defaults + agent block, removes model from 3 primary agents, adds/updates model on 6 subagents. No permission changes.
keyOutcomes: Global model and small_model set to zai-coding-plan/glm-5.2
Built-in subagents (general, explore, scout) pinned to GLM 5.2 via config agent block
Primary agents (01-Planner, Boost, Build) have no explicit model -- inherit global default
All 6 custom subagents have explicit model: zai-coding-plan/glm-5.2
cove-verifier updated from zai-coding/glm-4.7 to zai-coding-plan/glm-5.2
No permission blocks, prompts, or tools modified
risks: JSONC comments may break ConvertFrom-Json validation (mitigated with raw string search fallback in task 4.2)
Bun-is-not-defined tool failure in build env (mitigated with PowerShell fallback instructions per task)
cove-verifier model line is at END of frontmatter, not after mode: (handled with targeted replacement in task 3.3)
validationCriteria: No agent file contains glm-5.1 or glm-4.7
Config model and small_model are both zai-coding-plan/glm-5.2
Config agent block includes general, explore, scout with glm-5.2 pins
Primary agents (01-planner, boost, build) have no model: frontmatter key
Permission blocks unchanged in all agent files
OpenCode restart required to load changes (documented, not executed)
